overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a high-tech corporate facility with dominant red neon lighting. The player moves through a control room with server racks and glitching monitors, transitions through a main hall with prominent warning displays and a view of a traditional Japanese courtyard featuring a large green dragon statue, and ends by entering the serene outdoor courtyard with stone walls and wooden architectural elements.

segments.scene_description: In the spacious main hall dominated by large red warning displays, the player observes a striking green jade dragon statue visible through traditional Japanese wooden screens, creating a stark contrast between the modern facility and classical architecture.

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the high-tech facility into a serene traditional Japanese courtyard featuring stone walls covered in ivy, wooden lattice ceilings, and traditional architectural elements, marking a stark contrast between the modern and classical environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, high-tech corporate interior into a serene traditional Japanese courtyard. It begins in a weapon storage room with red warning signage, moving through a narrow corridor into a control room filled with server racks and monitors displaying glitching static under purple ambient light. As the camera exits the control room past elevator doors, the scene opens into a spacious main hall dominated by industrial ceilings and large red warning displays. The perspective then shifts toward a workstation with a green radar display before revealing a striking jade dragon statue glimpsed through wooden screens. Finally, the camera transitions fully out of the modern facility and into an outdoor courtyard featuring ivy-covered stone walls and traditional wooden lattice architecture.
